news.title:
The US proposed a 100% tariff on patented drugs, with generics exempt for now; Sun Pharma may face risks.
India's generic drug exports, accounting for 95% of $10.5B US shipments, face uncertainty due to review in a year.
news.summary:
The US proposed a 100% tariff on patented drugs, with generics exempt for now; Sun Pharma may face risks.
India's generic drug exports, accounting for 95% of $10.5B US shipments, face uncertainty due to review in a year.

news.title: Sun Pharma faces pressure as Trump's 100% tariff impact hits pharma stocks.
news.summary: Sun Pharma faces pressure as Trump's 100% tariff impact hits pharma stocks.

news.title:
Sun Pharma shares fell 6% on April 2 due to US tariff concerns on drugmakers.
US tariffs could impact Sun Pharma, which derives 31% of sales from the US market.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma shares fell 6% on April 2 due to US tariff concerns on drugmakers.
US tariffs could impact Sun Pharma, which derives 31% of sales from the US market.

news.title:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.
news.summary:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.

news.title:
Pharma stocks decline, with major stocks falling 3-5%.
Sun Pharma emerges as the biggest loser on the Nifty index.
news.summary:
Pharma stocks decline, with major stocks falling 3-5%.
Sun Pharma emerges as the biggest loser on the Nifty index.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.

news.title:
Delhi HC restrains Intas from using 'BEVATAS', citing infringement on Sun Pharma's 'BEVETEX' trademark.
Court prioritizes public health, highlighting risks of confusion in oncology drugs; Sun Pharma waived damages claim.
news.summary:
Delhi HC restrains Intas from using 'BEVATAS', citing infringement on Sun Pharma's 'BEVETEX' trademark.
Court prioritizes public health, highlighting risks of confusion in oncology drugs; Sun Pharma waived damages claim.

news.title:
HC restricts Intas from selling a drug similar to Sun Pharma's Bevetyx.
This bolsters Sun Pharma's intellectual property in the oncology market.
news.summary:
HC restricts Intas from selling a drug similar to Sun Pharma's Bevetyx.
This bolsters Sun Pharma's intellectual property in the oncology market.

news.title:
Sun Pharma's Fibromun trials for sarcoma and glioblastoma missed primary endpoints.
Positive Phase II results for Nidlegy in skin cancers prompt new studies.
news.summary:

news.title:
Sun Pharma reported an NSE block trade of 139,124 shares at Rs. 1,800 each.
The total trade value amounted to approximately Rs. 25.04 crore.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.

news.title:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.
news.summary:

news.title:
UBS maintains Buy on Sun Pharma, revises target to Rs 2200 from Rs 2450.
Growth driven by Illumya, Leqselvi, Unloxcyt; upside possible from Semaglutide launch.

news.title:
Sun Pharma launched Noveltreat for weight management and Sematrinity for type 2 diabetes.
Both products are priced lower than innovators, enhancing affordability in India.
news.summary:

news.title:
Mutual funds overweight on pharma, healthcare as growth visibility improves; sector accounts for 7.3% of portfolios in Feb 2026.
Pharma stocks like Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Biocon outperform Nifty 50; long-term returns strong despite risks like regulation and competition.
